rationale: The cited paper is used only once, in the Study 6 discussion, to support a general point that strong ties are typically more influential than weak ties. This citation appears as peripheral background in a limitation/future-context sentence rather than in the core theory, hypothesis development, design, or mechanism tests of the article. The main contribution of the citing paper (donor- vs charity-focused WOM, message altruism, and persuasion efficacy) does not build directly on or analyze the cited paper's framework.
